creator: @sethgolie
transcript: Well, let's go to Starbucks on our way to work. Yeah, man, I'll get the turkey bacon egg white sandwich with the egg white bites and then a grande americano with the sugar-free vanilla syrup and a splash of almond milk. Okay, cool. But actually, what if we went to Dunkin' instead? What would you order there? Yeah, I'll get the turkey sausage wake-up wrap with the egg white bites and then let's do a cold brew with sugar-free vanilla and a splash of almond milk. Dang, man, how do you always know what to order? Bro, are you not following Seth G. yet? Well, damn, I better make sure to follow Seth G. right now.
caption: Comment "Fast Food" for my FREE fast food swaps cheat sheet. Steal these top 3 breakfast fast food swaps. Starbucks: Grande Cold Brew (splash almond milk) + Turkey Bacon Cheddar & Egg White Sandwich + Egg White Bites (add-on for more protein) 570 calories | 43g protein. Chick-fil-a: Egg White Grill Greek Yogurt Parfait (no granola) Unsweet Tea / Black Coffee 480 calories | 42g protein. McDonald's: Egg McMuffin (no cheese) 2x Scrambled Eggs Black Coffee / Zero Sugar Drink 420 calories | 33g protein. Follow @sethgolie for fast food swaps.
ocr_summary: Starbucks: 1330 cal / 35g protein (original) vs 410 cal / 34g protein (swap shown on screen). Dunkin: 1150 cal / 30g protein (original) vs 380 cal / 24g protein (swap). Caption lists different numbers (570/43g, 480/42g, 420/33g) for Starbucks/CFA/McDonalds respectively.

swaps.swap_meal: Turkey Bacon Cheddar & Egg White Sandwich + Egg White Bites + Grande Cold Brew (splash almond milk, sugar-free vanilla)
swap_ingredients: turkey bacon cheddar egg white sandwich

parsed.notes: Breakfast-focused reel covering 4 restaurants. Video shows Starbucks and Dunkin' visually with skit format. Caption adds Chick-fil-A and McDonald's swaps (not shown in video). OCR calorie numbers differ from caption - OCR shows lower swap calories (410/380) vs caption (570/480). Caption numbers are likely more accurate as they include all items.
